  • Contributo all’adozione etica e consapevole dell’AI all’interno delle organizzazioni clienti.

Premessa importante

E' importante compilare il proprio CV prestando molta attenzione al contenuto.

Non basta scrivere: sviluppatore software... neppure java developer... se stiamo cercando javisti è superfluo indicarmi che sai sei uno sviluppatore che conosce java.

Prima mi devi raccontare dove hai imparato java: a scuola, con un corso di quanti mesi, durante quanti anni di lavoro...

Poi quando mi parli delle tue esperienze, non ti devi fermare al funzionale ma devi scendere nel giusto dettaglio tecnico: ad esempio, sapere che ha sviluppato il gestionale per gestire gli ordini di un negozio non basta.

Mi devi spiegare quali erano le tue responsabilità, che architettura hai pensato, che framework hai usato, come hai progetto il database, devi descrivere tecnicamente le varie funzionalità.

Il cv è la tua lettera di presentazione che deve indurre a scegliere te rispetto a tutti gli altri.

Il tempo è una risorsa preziosa; non possiamo ascoltare tutti. Dobbiamo fare una scelta e la facciamo in base a quello che leggiamo nel CV.

Competenze

  • Progettare e costruire applicazioni full stack che abilitano workflow AI-driven
  • Realizzare servizi backend scalabili che supportano interazioni AI in tempo reale, knowledge retrieval e automazione
  • Collaborare con i nostri Data Scientist AI per integrare modelli AI (sia Machine Learning che GenAI) in applicazioni production-ready
  • Contribuire nello sviluppo e nel mantenimento delle nostre piattaforme di AI Ops
  • Iterare e migliorare continuamente i prodotti AI, bilanciando esigenze utente e fattibilità tecnica
  • Integrazione di modelli AI e agenti conversazionali nei sistemi aziendali
  • Sviluppo e manutenzione delle nostre piattaforme di AI Ops
  • Scrittura di codice robusto, efficiente e con dipendenze minime
  • Documentazione dei sistemi AI

Più in dettaglio

Economics

  • Contratto collettivo nazionale di lavoro del commercio: 14 mensilità
  • RAL massimo di 32K
  • Valutiamo contratto di apprendistato per i candidati sotto i trent'anni

Le Sedi Di Lavoro Sono

  • Milano o Torino

Le Modalità Di Lavoro Sono

  • Ibrido o full remoto a seconda del cliente

Cosa Pensiamo Di Poter Offrire

  • Inserimento in una realtà dinamica e flessibile in cui potrà esprimere le proprie attitudini
  • Corsi di specializzazione in base al progetto assegnato
  • Ambiente di lavoro dinamico e ad alto contenuto professionale
  • Inserimento in progetti sfidanti e di innovazione tecnologica

Lavorare In KING Vorrà Dire

  • Avere l'opportunità di sperimentarsi presso clienti prestigiosi e ambienti lavorativi diversi
  • Mettersi alla prova con progetti ambiziosi che contribuiranno non solo alla crescita aziendale ma anche alla tua crescita professionale

L’offerta è da intendersi nel rispetto delle norme sulle parità di trattamento (L.125/91, art.4 comma 3) in materia di occupazione e di condizioni di lavoro (L.903/77, L.125/91, D.Lgs. 215/03 e 216/03, ex D.Lgs n. 196/03 in materia di privacy).

Clicca per leggere l'informativa sulla privacy: https://www.kingsrl.com/download/informativa_privacy.pdf

Title: Data Scientist
Description:
Job description:



 

 

If you’ve worn a pair of glasses, we’ve already met.


We are a global leader in the design, manufacture, and distribution of ophthalmic lenses, frames, and sunglasses. We offer our industry stakeholders in over 150 countries access to a global platform of high-quality vision care products (such as the Essilor brand, with Varilux, Crizal, Eyezen, Stellest and Transitions), iconic brands that consumers love (such as Ray-Ban, Oakley, Persol, Oliver Peoples, Vogue Eyewear and Costa), as well as a network that offers consumers high-quality vision care and best-in-class shopping experiences (such as Sunglass Hut, LensCrafters, Salmoiraghi & Viganò and the GrandVision network), and leading e-commerce platforms.

 

Join our global community of over 190,000 dedicated employees around the world in driving the transformation of the eyewear and eyecare industry.

 

Discover more by following us on LinkedIn! 

 

 

Your #FutureInSight with EssilorLuxottica

Are you willing to pioneer new frontiers, foster inclusivity and collaboration, embrace agility, ignite passion, and make a positive impact on the world? Join us in redefining the boundaries of what’s possible.

 

Your role 

 

The Data Scientist is responsible for the design, development and industrialization of scalable machine learning solutions across EssilorLuxottica’s value chain. The role ensures the delivery of production-grade AI systems integrated into business processes, generating measurable impact.

The position works in close collaboration with multiple business functions.

 

 

Main responsibilities:

 

Design, develop, and deploy end-to-end machine learning solutions, ensuring scalability, reliability, and performance
Build and maintain data pipelines, feature engineering workflows, and model training processes
Manage the full ML lifecycle, including validation, deployment, monitoring, and retraining
Partner closely with business stakeholders to translate business requirements into technical solutions
Identify and deliver high-impact AI use cases aligned with enterprise priorities
Develop models across core domains (e.g., forecasting, customer intelligence, computer vision, generative AI)
Contribute to scalable ML frameworks and reusable components for enterprise-wide deployments
Ensure adoption of MLOps best practices (versioning, monitoring, observability, continuous improvement)
Guarantee compliance with data governance, security, and quality standards
Collaborate with cross-functional teams including data scientists, engineers, and product stakeholders

 

 

Main requirements:

 

Master’s degree or PhD in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or related field
Minimum 5 years of experience in Machine Learning Engineering or similar roles
Strong proficiency in Python and ML frameworks (e.g., PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn)
Proven experience delivering ML solutions in production environments
Strong understanding of the end-to-end ML lifecycle
Experience with cloud platforms (Azure preferred) and data architectures
Solid software engineering skills (APIs, system design, version control)
Ability to manage complex technical initiatives autonomously
Fluent English

 

 

What’s in it for you:

 

In EssilorLuxottica, you are not defined just by your job title. Each career adventure is unique; have a glimpse of some of the benefits you will enjoy as a successful candidate:

Access to our cutting-edge learning platform, Leonardo, and personalized development programs to help you grow professionally and personally.
Enjoy flexible work conditions, health insurance coverage, ticket restaurants, internal rooftop canteen.
Access special offers for employees on a vast range of eyewear, eye care products, and fashion apparel, so you can enjoy our world-class brands firsthand.
Enjoy our “Disconnect Program” a holistic approach to work-life balance, including initiatives for mental health, yoga, jogging sessions, and more, designed to help you recharge and stay healthy.

 

 

Recruiting process:

 

Our recruitment process may vary; If you are selected, you will be contacted by our recruiters to guide you through the specific steps for your application.​



 

Salary Package:

Annual Gross Salary: 35.000 Eur – 50.000 Eur
Comprehensive Benefits Package:
Supplementary Health insurance coverage
Supplementary Pension Plan
Access to the EssilorLuxottica Corporate Welfare Catalog
Transportation – Discounted pass
Meal Vouchers as per company guidelines
Exclusive employee discounts on company products
Company-provided laptop and mobile phone

 

Our Diversity, Equity and Inclusion commitment​

 

We are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We celebrate diversity and provide equal opportunities to all, regardless of race, gender, ethnicity, religion, disability, sexual orientation, or any other characteristic that makes us unique.

Title: Senior Data Scientist
Description:
Enabling What’s Next




Who We Are😎

Born in 2004 as Techedge, we have more than 20 years of expertise that enabled us to become what we are today: Avvale!

This path led us to be able to count on over 3500 employees, present in 12 countries around the world.




What We Do🌱

We help public and private companies to re-design their business models through the development of innovative and sustainable solutions, which have a positive impact not only on our customers but also on the world we live in!




How we do💡

Through circular economy models, made possible thanks to technological innovation.




What you will find 🔍

In Avvale we value our talents and your path with us will be full of:

Flexibility, thanks to our policy you can work remotely in Italy, up to 5 days a week, and in SEE and Switzerland up to 5 months a year;

Training & development as you can participate to training on the job, certifications, foreign languages classes and you will have a yearly budget to buy training courses;

Gender equality & inclusion, the obtaining of Pdr 125 is a proof of Avvale commitment to an inclusive and fair work environment;

Compensation & Benefits: In line with our commitment to transparency and people development, the gross annual salary (RAL) for this position ranges between €31,000 and €44,000, commensurate with experience and skills. The position is covered by the 'CCNL Commercio e Terziario' (National Collective Labor Agreement for Commerce and Service Sector), alongside a benefits package that includes meal vouchers, wellbeing initiatives (including Wellhub), and growth opportunities.




Role and responsibilities:




You will be part of an area that takes care of Artificial Intelligence.




As a Data Scientist, you will work for customers and internal research departments on complex and innovative projects about genAI, NLP, demand forecasting, predictive maintenance, computer vision, and lots more, in various fields and sectors.

You will focus on solving complex problems: translating requirements into actionable rules and

deliverables.




You will be responsible for:

Analyzing business needs and proposing the most effective technical approach, choosing between classical AI, GenAI, or hybrid solutions.
Designing the end-to-end AI solution, translating business requirements into technical specifications.
Designing and implementing solutions based on Machine Learning and advanced statistical methods, as well as GenAI architectures (RAG, agents, LLM orchestration, prompt engineering, fine-tuning when needed).
Assessing when to rely on an LLM/GenAI solution versus a classical ML approach, based on robustness, accuracy, and cost-effectiveness.
Validating developed models with a focus on explainability, generalization, robustness, and production behavior (including GenAI-specific risks such as hallucinations, bias, and inference costs).
Preparing and presenting technical and non-technical reports, adapting the storytelling to the audience's level.
Staying up to date on developments in Data Science, ML, and GenAI, proposing new ideas and participating in pre-sales activities.




Required Skills🛹

At least 2 years of relevant experience designing and implementing AI/ML solutions.
Hands-on experience applying advanced analytics/ML techniques to real business cases, with a proven ability to synthesize complex data and present results.
Practical experience with advanced analytics/ML techniques and GenAI solutions applied to real business cases .
Strong proficiency in Python and core AI frameworks/libraries.




Come with us💪

You will have the opportunity to work and get in touch with international players who will allow you to increase your know-how in view of future challenges!




We do not consider applications without CV.

Avvale promotes equal opportunity. We enhance diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment in compliance with applicable non-discrimination and data protection laws.

Title: GROWTH DATA SCIENTIST
Description:
WHAT IS EDENRED?




Edenred is a global leader in the employee benefits sector, offering companies digital solutions dedicated to improve the well-being of people at work.




A digital platform that connects 60 million users and over 2 million affiliated businesses in 44 countries through about 1 million corporate clients. In Italy, the ecosystem involves 3 million users, over 180.000 corporate clients and more than 300.000 affiliated establishments, making its network the most widespread, present in every Italian country.




Edenred’s solutions improve quality of life and strengthen employee engagement—from lunch breaks to leisure time, personal care, and sustainable mobility. Meal vouchers, shopping vouchers and corporate welfare tools are tailored to all types of organizations and employees. They support HR departments, make companies more attractive and efficient, and stimulate both the labor market and the local economy.




True to the Group’s purpose “Enrich connections. For good.”, these solutions develop and enrich connections that empower businesses and promote inclusive solutions, placing people, the environment, and local communities at the center through a concrete ESG commitment.




Edenred’s 12,000 employees are dedicated every day to making the world of work a more connected, safer, more efficient, and more responsible ecosystem.




In 2024, thanks to its global technology assets, the Group managed close to €45 billion in business volume, primarily carried out via mobile applications, online platforms and cards.




Edenred is listed on the Euronext Paris stock exchange and included in the following indices: CAC Large 60, Euronext 100, Euronext Tech Leaders, FTSE4Good, DJSI Europe Index, DJSI World Index, and MSCI Europe.




YOU WILL VIBE WITH US




We are looking for a Growth Data Scientist with proven experience in developing Advanced Analytics and Machine Learning solutions to support business processes, particularly in the areas of Sales and Customer Management.

The successful candidate will work closely with business stakeholders, transforming data and insights into concrete actions while contributing to the adoption of models within operational processes.

This role requires a strong combination of technical expertise and business acumen, operating in a hybrid environment that combines model development with their practical application across business functions.




Key Responsibilities:




Design, develop, and deploy Machine Learning and Advanced Analytics models
Build predictive models (e.g., churn, cross-sell, up-sell, propensity models, etc.) and develop the related features and datasets
Translate models into operational outputs (customer lists, scores, targeting logics) to support commercial processes
Collaborate with business stakeholders to understand requirements and translate them into data-driven solutions
Monitor model performance and business impact, contributing to a test-and-learn approach
Present insights, results, and strategic recommendations to management
Work closely with Data Engineering and IT teams to ensure data quality, governance, and availability
Contribute to the evolution of the company’s data-driven strategy




WE WILL VIBE WITH YOU




Passion for customer, respect, imagination, simplicity and entrepreneurial spirit are the values we look for in our people. If you recognize yourself and want to get involved in a stimulating and multinational environment, send us your application and become an Edenreder too!




Minimum 3–5 years of experience in Data Scientist roles, preferably within Sales or Customer Analytics
Strong knowledge of Python, PySpark, SQL, and major Machine Learning libraries (e.g., scikit-learn, XGBoost, TensorFlow, or similar)
Hands-on experience with Azure Databricks (including Workflows and Job Orchestration) and familiarity with the Azure ecosystem: Azure Machine Learning, Azure DevOps, Azure Data Factory
Practical experience in developing predictive models with end-to-end project ownership (e.g., propensity, churn, segmentation)
Ability to work with complex and/or incomplete datasets
Good understanding of data architectures and ETL/ELT pipelines for data preparation and transformation
Degree in a scientific or quantitative discipline
Fluent English




Soft Skills & Qualifications




Strong interest in applying analytical models to real business contexts (particularly Sales and Marketing, though not exclusively)
Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills, including interaction with senior management
Strong storytelling and presentation skills for both technical and non-technical audiences
Ability to interpret data strategically and with a results-oriented mindset
Ability to translate models and analyses into actionable business outputs




Nice to Have




Experience with Data Visualization tools (Power BI or similar)
Experience in CRM and campaign management environments
Familiarity with dbt, Airflow, and development environments such us VS Code




OTHER DETAILS




Permanent Contract
CCNL Commercio
Gross Annual Salary (RAL) starting from € 38.000, determined on the basis of objective and transparent criteria, including professional experience gained, specialized technical skills, the level of autonomy and responsibility required, and alignment with the company's compensation and job classification framework
Performance bonus in line with the company's incentive plan







🏡 Smart-working (10 days/month)
🍽️ Ticket Restaurant®
🛍️ Welfare Plan
🩺 Comprehensive health benefits, including supplementary medical insurance, accident protection and life coverage







EQUAL OPPORTUNITIES AND HIRING PROCESS




Edenred fosters an inclusive workplace grounded in equal opportunity, with recruitment and career development processes based on fairness, transparency, and merit.

Candidates are assessed without discrimination on the basis of gender, age, ethnicity, social background, nationality, sexual orientation, personal or religious beliefs, disability, or any other legally protected characteristic.

Title: Software / Machine Learning Engineer
Description:
Are you looking for a new challenge?

Fancy helping us shape the future of motor insurance?

Prima could be the place for you.

Since 2015, we’ve been using our love of data and tech to rethink motor insurance and bring drivers a great experience at a great price. Our story began in Italy, where we’ve quickly become the number one online motor insurance provider. In fact, we’re trusted by over 5 million drivers. And now we’re expanding to help millions more drivers in the UK and Spain.

To help fuel that growth, we need a Software Engineer- Machine Learning to join our Engineering team.

This team is the beating heart of Prima.

You’ll be joining over +350 engineers across software development, infrastructure, operations and security. Fueled by curiosity, experimentation and collaboration, you’ll help deliver scalable, impactful solutions that shape the future of insurance.

Excited to make an impact? Here are the details

The team mission is to exploit the power of machine learning to revolutionize the insurance claims process. To help fuel that growth, we need a Software Engineer to join our Claims Machine Learning team.

What You’ll Do


Leverage Machine Learning and advanced data analytics to identify risks and opportunities in our claims management platform.
Analyze and interpret complex data to support the claims management lifecycle.
Contribute directly to the company’s growth and long-term success through actionable insights.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to transform data into intelligence and intelligence into action


What We’re Looking For


Software Engineer First: You’re a strong software engineer at heart: you write clean, maintainable, and production-ready code. While you're comfortable handling data, generating insights, and training machine learning models, you approach these tasks with a software engineering mindset, prioritizing scalability, reliability, and performance.
Analytical Prowess: Strong quantitative, logical, and analytical skills are essential. At Prima, you'll tackle diverse and stimulating challenges that will put your skills to the test
Strong Python background with hands-on experience in Pandas, Numpy, PyTorch or Tensorflow, Hugging Face and GenAI.
Proficient with RDBMS ( Postgres )
Broad ML Knowledge: You have a solid grasp of various machine learning paradigms: from classical models to cutting-edge approaches like deep learning, computer vision, and generative AI. You know when and how to apply the right technique to solve real-world problems effectively.


Nice-to-Have


Have international experience and are fluency in English
Know how to create, manipulate and analyze large datasets
Background in developing applications using Elixir/Rust.
Experience working in a Cloud-based environment ( AWS preferred ) is a plus


€55,000 - €85,000 a year

We want to make Prima a happy and empowering place to work. So if you decide to join us, you can expect plenty of perks.

Title: AI Engineer
Description:
Within the Group Data Artificial Intelligence and Automation Solutions function, we are looking for a talented and proactive resource to join the team. The function is in charge of driving the execution of key Artificial Intelligence projects at Group level, related both to AI-driven automation and AI recommendations/predictions to support the Generali growth. The function is also responsible for designing, implementing, and continuously improving a library of central shared analytics/automation services, leveraging cutting-edge technologies, algorithms, and methodologies, available for the BUs through a central platform.




Key responsibilities of the role will include:

Supporting the project set-up, the analysis of the as-is processes, the creation of a business case, and the design of the target end-to-end solution, including the models and data needed to maximize the business impact
Developing end-to-end AI projects (data pre-processing, algorithm selection, training, evaluation/test, and code-base maintenance)
Presenting and explaining the projects results and the solution’s performances to the business stakeholders
Researching bleeding-edge techniques and tools to bring new research topics and methodologies from paper to production and contribute to the library of ready-to-use shared algorithms used worldwide




Requirements

Our ideal candidate will meet the following requirements:

Master’s degree in STEM disciplines (Engineering, Mathematics, Physics, Computer Science)
At least 2 years of experience, as a data scientist or AI/ML engineer
Experience in designing, developing, and evaluating Statistical or Machine Learning models (clustering, classification, regression, forecasting, etc.)
Proficiency with at least one programming languages (Python, Java, C, etc.)
Strong theoretical and practical knowledge on one among NLP and Computer Vision techniques
Knowledge of the main LLMs (GPT, Claude, Llama, Mistral, etc.) and related libraries (LangChain, LLamaIndex, etc.), and prompt engineering
Proficiency with Data Science libraries (Pandas, Scikit-learn, Numpy, etc.)
Fluent English




Soft skills:

Strong problem-solving, analytical and deductive skills, creativity, and determination
Ability to work in a team, operational autonomy, proactivity, high level of commitment and result oriented




What we offer




We offer employment at the VI level with the relevant salary, in accordance with the CCNL ANIA for non-executive employees and the Generali Group Company Agreement.

Gross annual salary ranging between 45.000,00€ and 60.000,00€. The final offer will be aligned with the candidate’s professional experience, technical and soft skills relevant to the role, and may include an individual variable component.

We also offer:

Smart working and flexible hours
Corporate welfare system
Meal vouchers
Supplementary health insurance and discounted insurance policies
Well-being initiatives
Training and development
Structured continuous learning paths (technical and managerial)
Career development programs within the Group
Access to learning platforms and internal mobility opportunities, including international




Why Join Generali




Joining Generali means becoming part of an international Group with a strong heritage and a forward-looking vision, where people are at the center of our sustainable growth strategy.




We foster a responsible, inclusive, and innovation-driven work environment, where everyone can contribute to creating value for customers, society, and the communities in which we operate. We believe that diversity, equity and inclusion are essential to building a stronger culture and driving sustainable growth.




At Generali, you will find opportunities to grow through continuous learning, career development paths, and internal mobility across the Group. We recognize talent and merit, and support flexibility as a key enabler of well-being and a sustainable work-life balance.




Working with us means sharing strong values and taking on meaningful challenges together to build a safer and more sustainable future every day.




As an Equal Opportunity Employer, Generali evaluates all applications based exclusively on objective and gender-neutral criteria, including skills, experience and potential, ensuring fairness and transparency throughout the selection process.




Company Profile

Generali Group Head Office is the guidelining unit of the Generali Group, one of the largest global insurance and asset management providers. Established in 1831, Generali is present in over 50 countries in the world, with a total premium income of € 82.5 billion in 2023. With around 82,000 employees serving 70 million customers, the Group has a leading position in Europe and a growing presence in Asia and Latin America. At the heart of Generali’s strategy is its Lifetime Partner commitment to customers, achieved through innovative and personalised solutions, best-in-class customer experience and its digitalised global distribution capabilities. The Group has fully embedded sustainability into all strategic choices, with the aim to create value for all stakeholders while building a fairer and more resilient society.

Title: AI & Data Science Engineer
Description:
Job Description

DXC Technology is looking for a Data Scientist to support AI and Generative AI projects, contributing to practical solutions and improving business processes through ML models, NLP and intelligent automation, within the Data & AI team based in Milan.

Key Responsibilities


Contribute to the design and implementation of AI solutions, including machine learning models, NLP, and computer vision applications
Collaborate with senior team members to understand client requirements and translate them into practical AI solutions
Support the direct relationship with clients/stakeholders for requirements gathering and solution validation
Support pre-sales activities, including preparing technical materials and contributing to client presentations
Stay up to date on AI trends and emerging technologies, applying knowledge to support solution development
Contribute to maintaining best practices and methodologies within the AI & Data Science team
Take part in AI solution projects, gaining hands-on experience in real client environments and progressively growing in autonomy.


Requirements


Proven experience in Gen AI projects.
Ability to translate business requirements into practical AI solutions, including design and implementation.
Deep expertise in core Generative AI technologies, including Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Prompt Engineering, Observability, and AI Guardrails.
Extensive experience with enterprise-grade GenAI development frameworks and platforms, including LangChain, LangGraph, LiteLLM, and Langfuse.
Proven experience in addressing AI governance, GDPR, and EU AI Act compliance requirements throughout the AI solution lifecycle.
Good knowledge of machine learning frameworks and libraries (Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, etc.)
Strong proficiency in AI-powered software development and code generation tools.
Extensive experience with enterprise software delivery practices and platforms, including source code management, CI/CD pipelines, and automated deployment frameworks.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Good communication skills and strong ability to work in a collaborative team.
Growing autonomy in managing assigned tasks and deliverables.
Ability to organize project activities by identifying priorities and ensuring deadlines are met


Nice to Have


Previous involvement in presales or solution support tasks


Location: Milan, with smart working possibility

Why Join Us

Offer Package

The position offers a gross annual base salary starting from €48.000

Compensation is determined in line with the applicable collective labor agreement (CBA: Contratto Collettivo Nazionale di Lavoro per l'industria metalmeccanica e della installazione di impianti) and based on objective and gender-neutral criteria, including responsibility, experience and skills.


Health Insurance
Permanent disability by accident coverage
Life and permanent disability by accident coverage
Meal vouchers
Supplemental Pension Plan
Smart Working Agreement
Employee Discounts Program


Continuous Learning — Access learning platforms and take part in skill development programs designed for you.

Refer & Earn — Help us find great talent through the Employee Referral Program and get rewarded for your contribution.

Career Development — DXC promotes professional growth and internal mobility by making every open position accessible to all employees. Through the Performance Development program, the company supports individual aspirations to achieve shared goals together.

Our Way of Working — At DXC, we believe that strong connections and collaboration drive success. Our hybrid work model combines flexibility with in-person teamwork, empowering you to perform at your best while maintaining balance and wellbeing.

At DXC Technology, we believe strong connections and community are key to our success. Our work model prioritizes in-person collaboration while offering flexibility to support wellbeing, productivity, individual work styles, and life circumstances. We’re committed to fostering an inclusive environment where everyone can thrive.

Title: AI Research for Bone-Conducted Speech Enhancement
Description:
OUR STORY

At STMicroelectronics, we believe in the power of technology to drive innovation and make a positive impact on people, businesses, and society. As a global semiconductor company, our advanced technologies and chips form the hidden foundation of the world we live in today.

When you join ST, you will be part of a global business with more than 115 nationalities, present in 40 countries, and comprising over 50,000 diverse and dedicated creators and makers of technology around the world.

Developing technologies takes more than talent: it takes amazing people who understand collaboration and respect. People with passion and the desire to disrupt the status quo, drive innovation, and unlock their own potential.

Embark on a journey with us, where you can innovate for a future that we want to make smarter and greener, in a responsible and sustainable way. Our technology starts with you.

About The Project

Speech captured with body-conduction sensors is particularly attractive for wearable applications because it can remain usable in noisy environments and when conventional microphones are not practical. However, this type of signal is typically bandwidth-limited and less intelligible than air-conducted speech, and it often requires speech enhancement to recover both intelligibility and perceived quality.

Recent deep learning approaches have shown strong potential for bandwidth extension and speech enhancement, but there is still room to improve both performance and efficiency, especially for wearable and resource-constrained scenarios.

In this internship, the student will work within an R&D team on research aimed at advancing our current speech enhancement work for body-conducted speech. The starting point will be our existing solution, but the objective is broader: to explore new architectures, training strategies, or learning paradigms that can further push the state of the art in bone-conducted speech enhancement.

YOUR ROLE


You contribute to the research and development of a speech enhancement solution for body-conducted speech, with the goal of improving and extending our current approach.
You take part in investigating alternative model architectures, training strategies, and conditioning methods, and in evaluating their impact on speech quality and intelligibility.
You contribute to the implementation of the AI pipeline in Python, including data processing, training, validation, and experimental analysis.


Your Skills & Experiences


The candidate is currently pursuing, or has recently completed, a Master’s degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Electronic Engineering, Signal Processing, or a related technical field
Strong programming skills in Python
Good experience with PyTorch or another major deep learning framework
In-depth knowledge of digital signal processing
Strong interest in speech processing and audio AI
Experience working with audio signals is a plus
Familiarity with speech enhancement, bandwidth extension, or related tasks is a plus


ST is proud to be one of the 17 companies certified as a 2025 Global Top Employer and the first and only semiconductor company to achieve this distinction. ST was recognized in this ranking thanks to its continuous improvement approach and stands out particularly in the areas of ethics & integrity, purpose & values, organization & change, business strategy, and performance.

At ST, we endeavor to foster a diverse and inclusive workplace, and we do not tolerate discrimination. We aim to recruit and retain a diverse workforce that reflects the societies around us. We strive for equity in career development, career opportunities, and equal remuneration. We encourage candidates who may not meet every single requirement to apply, as we appreciate diverse perspectives and provide opportunities for growth and learning. Diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) is woven into our company culture.

To discover more, visit st.com/careers.

Title: Senior Data Scientist | Milan
Description:
Senior Data Scientist | Milan




Up to €95,000 + bonus

Hybrid Working in Central Milan




We’re hiring a Senior Data Scientist for a global organisation operating at the intersection of data, analytics, and AI-driven decision-making. This is a highly influential role, sitting at the forefront of data science strategy and shaping how advanced analytics and AI are applied across complex, real-world problems.

You’ll work closely with senior stakeholders and global engineering and product teams to deliver high-impact, data-driven solutions, including an AI-powered platform focused on risk and resilience.




As Senior Data Scientist, you will:

Define and execute a data science strategy aligned to product and business objectives
Lead the design, development, and deployment of models and algorithms into production
Analyse large, complex datasets to identify patterns and trends, translating insights into actionable product recommendations
Collaborate with global teams across product, engineering, and analytics to deliver high-quality, scalable solutions
Establish and uphold best practices across data science methodologies, including data preparation, model validation, and performance monitoring
Stay close to industry trends and emerging technologies, particularly in AI and GenAI




What we’re looking for

Strong, proven experience across Data Science, with exposure to Data Engineering and/or Machine Learning
Ability to operate autonomously within a global, distributed organisation
Solid experience selecting and applying appropriate methodologies, technologies, and techniques
Hands-on experience with data querying, manipulation, and analysis, including tools such as Pandas and NumPy




Nice to have

Experience working with Generative AI tools and approaches
Software engineering or programming experience, ideally in Python
Advanced academic background in Computer Science, Data Science, or equivalent industry experience




Up to €95,000 + bonus

Hybrid Working in Central Milan




If you’re a senior data scientist who enjoys combining strategic influence with hands-on technical depth, please apply or email wiil.semple@oliverbernard.com

Softwave Soluzioni & Tecnologie Srl, con le sue sedi di Roma e Milano, opera da oltre 20 anni sul territorio nazionale. La consulenza in ambito IT è il nostro core business. Se sei alla ricerca di un ambiente dove condividere e valorizzare le tue idee ed esprimere al meglio la tua passione per la programmazione questa è la nostra proposta!

PythonEsperienza concreta con LLM (sviluppo, fine-tuning, prompt engineering o integr

Title: Senior Consultant - Data Scientist
Description:
Per conto di un mio cliente, sono alla ricerca di un/una Senior Consultant - Data Scientist da inserire in un'importante realtà del settore retail, protagonista di un significativo percorso di trasformazione digitale e fortemente orientata all'innovazione.

La risorsa entrerà a far parte di un team Data Science in fase di crescita e lavorerà su progetti strategici ad alto impatto, contribuendo allo sviluppo di soluzioni innovative in ambiti quali Demand Forecasting, Supply Chain, Assortment, Pricing, Promozioni, Loyalty, Geomarketing e sviluppo della rete vendita.




Principali responsabilità:

Collaborare con i team di business per comprendere esigenze, processi e obiettivi operativi;
Tradurre i requisiti di business in problemi di Data Science e Analytics;
Sviluppare modelli di Machine Learning, analisi avanzate e strumenti data-driven in grado di generare valore concreto per il business;
Seguire l'intero ciclo di sviluppo delle soluzioni, dalla sperimentazione all'implementazione e adozione da parte degli utenti;
Supportare i team aziendali nelle fasi di test, validazione e integrazione delle soluzioni nei processi operativi.




Requisiti principali

Almeno 3 anni di esperienza in Data Science o Advanced Analytics.
Spiccata capacità di comunicazione e di gestione degli stakeholder, con esperienza nel collaborare con funzioni di business e nel tradurre esigenze operative in soluzioni data-driven.
Forte orientamento al business e capacità di comprendere processi, priorità e obiettivi aziendali.
Buona conoscenza di Python e SQL.
Conoscenze di Machine Learning, Statistica e Intelligenza Artificiale.
Esperienza con strumenti di Data Visualisation.
Buona conoscenza della lingua inglese.




Costituirà un plus aver maturato esperienza nel settore retail, nell'analisi di dati transazionali o in contesti consulenziali, con una spiccata capacità di trasformare esigenze di business in soluzioni analitiche.




La posizione prevede un modello di lavoro ibrido con 3 giorni a settimana in presenza presso gli uffici di Milano.

Se sei interessato/a a conoscere maggiori dettagli o stai valutando una nuova opportunità professionale, inviaci il tuo cv.




Pacchetto retributivo: RAL fino a €60.000, commisurata all'esperienza e alle competenze del candidato.

Title: AI & Data Engineer
Description:
Il nostro obiettivo è sempre stato quello di creare e ampliare nel tempo un gruppo di persone qualificato, affidabile e disponibile; puntando su professionisti esperti, ma anche sulla formazione, investendo risorse nella crescita professionale.

Dipendenti e collaboratori attraverso consolidate competenze tecniche, contribuiscono a rendere Craon un’azienda altamente qualificata e competitiva sul mercato ICT.

Cerchiamo un AI & Data Engineer con 3-5 anni di esperienza appassionato di dati e machine learning, pronto a lavorare su progetti end-to-end, dalle pipeline dati alla modellazione e deployment di modelli ML/AI su cloud.

Cosa farai:


Sviluppo di pipeline ETL/ELT e orchestrazione
Big Data processing e data engineering su Databricks e PySpark
Modellazione e addestramento di modelli ML (classification, regression, clustering)
Deployment e monitoraggio di modelli in produzione
Collaborazione con team Data, DevOps e Business per soluzioni scalabili



Competenze chiave:


Python (pandas, NumPy, Scikit-Learn, PySpark), SQL avanzato, Bash, Git
Databricks, MLflow, Docker, CI/CD
Cloud: AWS, GCP, Azure (servizi dati e ML)
Soft skills: analisi, debugging, comunicazione tecnica e autonomia



Sede: Milano ibrido o Torino ibrido

Offriamo contratto a tempo indeterminato (CCNL Commercio e Servizi) con RAL compresa tra 36.000 € e 45.000 €, da definire sulla base dell'esperienza professionale e delle competenze maturate. Si valutano anche candidature con Partita IVA.

Il presente annuncio è rivolto ad entrambi i sessi, ai sensi delle leggi 903/77 e 125/91 e a persone di tutte le età e tutte le nazionalità, ai sensi dei decreti legislativi 215/03 e 216/03.

Title: EXPERT DATA & AI SCIENTIST (IT)
Description:
Job Description

Come Expert Data & AI Scientist farai parte della funzione Digital Information Technologies di Eni e sarai una figura di riferimento all'interno del Centro di Eccellenza Data & AI. Opererai nell'intersezione tra strategia di business e tecnologie di intelligenza artificiale di ultima generazione (Foundation Models, GenAI, sistemi agentici), guidando la progettazione, lo sviluppo e la messa in produzione di soluzioni AI ad alto valore aggiunto.

Attività Principali


Tradurre obiettivi di business in casi d'uso AI prioritizzati su impatto, fattibilità, rischio e ROI
Effettuare il design di soluzioni scegliendo metodologia, approcci e tecnologie più adatte
Definire metriche di successo e framework di valutazione end-to-end definendo le metriche e gli obiettivi
Costruire sistemi agentici e applicazioni di AI Generativa integrando metodologie moderne ed approcci emergenti, implementando guardrail e meccanismi di sicurezza nel ciclo di vita della soluzione e collaborare con i team di engineering per il rilascio in produzione
Definire strategie di lifecycle management per modelli e prompt: retraining, A/B testing, rollback, gestione delle versioni dei foundation model di terze parti
Garantire la conformità all'EU AI Act supportando le valutazioni di conformità e collaborando con Compliance, Legal e DPO e producendo la documentazione tecnica adeguata
Presentare risultati a stakeholder eterogenei (C-level, business, tecnici) con storytelling efficace, data visualization e capacità di gestire aspettative su ciò che l'AI può e non può fare
Supportare la crescita di data scientist junior e mid-level, definire best practice e standard tecnici del CoE. Partecipare attivamente alla community aziendale Data & AI con attività di knowledge sharing, contributi a Medium / blog tecnici, partecipazione a conferenze e contribuire al posizionamento dell'azienda sulle tematiche AI.


Caratteristiche Richieste


Laurea magistrale in discipline STEM: Matematica, Fisica, Statistica, Computer Science, Ingegneria, Data Science; sarà valutato positivamente un dottorato nell’ambito
Almeno 3 anni di esperienza in ruoli di Data Scientist / ML Engineer / AI Engineer, con almeno 1 anno di esperienza su soluzioni Generative AI / LLM in produzione
Track record di progetti AI portati end-to-end dalla discovery al deployment, con misurazione dell'impatto di business
Padronanza di Python e dell'ecosistema scientifico (NumPy, Pandas, scikit-learn)
Solida conoscenza teorica e pratica di algoritmi supervisionati, non supervisionati, ensemble methods, time series, deep learning
Competenza in statistica e conoscenza dei metodi sperimentali: inferenza, A/B testing, causal inference, design degli esperimenti, metodologie necessarie per valutare sistemi GenAI e processi di NLP tramite costruzione di metriche e benchmark
Conoscenza SQL avanzato, esperienza di lavoro con dati strutturati e non strutturati, vector store, basi di data engineering
Esperienza pratica di consumo di modelli commerciali e open-weight e nella realizzazione di applicazioni pratiche con l’utilizzo di tecniche di Context Engineering e RAG
Conoscenze di metodologia MLOps e utilizzo di strumenti a supporto
Esperienza di sviluppo di modelli e applicazioni di AI su almeno un major cloud (AWS / Azure / GCP) tramite servizi AI gestiti (Bedrock, Azure ML/AI Foundry, Vertex AI).


Sede

San Donato Milanese

Promuoviamo forme flessibili di lavoro, offrendo opzioni di Smart working ed orari flessibili al fine di sostenere il maggior equilibrio tra vita professionale e personale.

Proponiamo


Contratto di lavoro a Tempo Indeterminato
Il nostro contratto collettivo nazionale di lavoro di riferimento è il CCNL Energia e Petrolio
Proponiamo una retribuzione annua lorda compresa 50.000€ e 70.000€
L’offerta finale sarà formulata in coerenza con l’esperienza professionale, le competenze tecniche e trasversali possedute dalla risorsa funzionali per il ruolo e apprezzabili per l’azienda
L’Azienda in presenza di esperienze professionali e competenze tecniche e trasversali particolarmente rilevanti potrà valutare un’offerta con un livello di inquadramento/RAL migliorativo

HTML:
Job Description

Come Expert Data & AI Scientist farai parte della funzione Digital Information Technologies di Eni e sarai una figura di riferimento all'interno del Centro di Eccellenza Data & AI. Opererai nell'intersezione tra strategia di business e tecnologie di intelligenza artificiale di ultima generazione (Foundation Models, GenAI, sistemi agentici), guidando la progettazione, lo sviluppo e la messa in produzione di soluzioni AI ad alto valore aggiunto.

Attività Principali

  • Tradurre obiettivi di business in casi d'uso AI prioritizzati su impatto, fattibilità, rischio e ROI
  • Effettuare il design di soluzioni scegliendo metodologia, approcci e tecnologie più adatte
  • Definire metriche di successo e framework di valutazione end-to-end definendo le metriche e gli obiettivi
  • Costruire sistemi agentici e applicazioni di AI Generativa integrando metodologie moderne ed approcci emergenti, implementando guardrail e meccanismi di sicurezza nel ciclo di vita della soluzione e collaborare con i team di engineering per il rilascio in produzione
  • Definire strategie di lifecycle management per modelli e prompt: retraining, A/B testing, rollback, gestione delle versioni dei foundation model di terze parti
  • Garantire la conformità all'EU AI Act supportando le valutazioni di conformità e collaborando con Compliance, Legal e DPO e producendo la documentazione tecnica adeguata
  • Presentare risultati a stakeholder eterogenei (C-level, business, tecnici) con storytelling efficace, data visualization e capacità di gestire aspettative su ciò che l'AI può e non può fare
  • Supportare la crescita di data scientist junior e mid-level, definire best practice e standard tecnici del CoE. Partecipare attivamente alla community aziendale Data & AI con attività di knowledge sharing, contributi a Medium / blog tecnici, partecipazione a conferenze e contribuire al posizionamento dell'azienda sulle tematiche AI.

Caratteristiche Richieste

  • Laurea magistrale in discipline STEM: Matematica, Fisica, Statistica, Computer Science, Ingegneria, Data Science; sarà valutato positivamente un dottorato nell’ambito
  • Almeno 3 anni di esperienza in ruoli di Data Scientist / ML Engineer / AI Engineer, con almeno 1 anno di esperienza su soluzioni Generative AI / LLM in produzione
  • Track record di progetti AI portati end-to-end dalla discovery al deployment, con misurazione dell'impatto di business
  • Padronanza di Python e dell'ecosistema scientifico (NumPy, Pandas, scikit-learn)
  • Solida conoscenza teorica e pratica di algoritmi supervisionati, non supervisionati, ensemble methods, time series, deep learning
  • Competenza in statistica e conoscenza dei metodi sperimentali: inferenza, A/B testing, causal inference, design degli esperimenti, metodologie necessarie per valutare sistemi GenAI e processi di NLP tramite costruzione di metriche e benchmark
  • Conoscenza SQL avanzato, esperienza di lavoro con dati strutturati e non strutturati, vector store, basi di data engineering
  • Esperienza pratica di consumo di modelli commerciali e open-weight e nella realizzazione di applicazioni pratiche con l’utilizzo di tecniche di Context Engineering e RAG
  • Conoscenze di metodologia MLOps e utilizzo di strumenti a supporto
  • Esperienza di sviluppo di modelli e applicazioni di AI su almeno un major cloud (AWS / Azure / GCP) tramite servizi AI gestiti (Bedrock, Azure ML/AI Foundry, Vertex AI).

Sede

San Donato Milanese

Promuoviamo forme flessibili di lavoro, offrendo opzioni di Smart working ed orari flessibili al fine di sostenere il maggior equilibrio tra vita professionale e personale.

Proponiamo

  • Contratto di lavoro a Tempo Indeterminato
  • Il nostro contratto collettivo nazionale di lavoro di riferimento è il CCNL Energia e Petrolio
  • Proponiamo una retribuzione annua lorda compresa 50.000€ e 70.000€
  • L’offerta finale sarà formulata in coerenza con l’esperienza professionale, le competenze tecniche e trasversali possedute dalla risorsa funzionali per il ruolo e apprezzabili per l’azienda
  • L’Azienda in presenza di esperienze professionali e competenze tecniche e trasversali particolarmente rilevanti potrà valutare un’offerta con un livello di inquadramento/RAL migliorativo
  • Sistema di reward e programma articolato di benefits e iniziative di welfare in ambito sanitario, previdenziale, di supporto al reddito e per la conciliazione vita-lavoro. Scopri di più: link welfare
  • Ambiente di lavoro in cui ogni risorsa possa sentirsi riconosciuta e apprezzata nella propria unicità

Title: Data Scientist – Senior Consultant
Description:
We are currently looking for an experienced Data Scientist to join our Data & Analytics team.

This position is a unique opportunity to unlock insights contained in the data universe working in a dynamic and innovative environment.

We are looking for candidates with an international background that have experience and strong knowledge in Data Analytics applications in multi-disciplinary environments that provide real-world impact for organizations.

You will be based in our office in Milan (preferably) or in Turin.

Background & Experience


Master's Degree in Statistics, Finance, Business Analytics, Mathematics, Physics, Computer Science or related area
4–5 years of experience in Data & Analytics, with proven ability to design and deliver data-driven solutions in business contexts


Technical Skills


Experience in developing and applying analytical models and machine learning techniques to solve real business problems (including both predictive and exploratory approaches)
Strong programming skills in Python and familiarity with modern data science libraries and frameworks
Experience working with data across the full lifecycle, from data preparation and exploration to model development and deployment
Familiarity with working in cloud-based data and AI environments (e.g. AWS, Azure, GCP), leveraging advanced analytics and scalable processing capabilities (e.g. Databricks or similar platforms)
Exposure to Generative AI and LLMs, including use cases such as text analysis, content generation, or process automation
Understanding of prompt engineering principles and ability to integrate LLM-based solutions into data and analytics workflows
Awareness of best practices in model lifecycle management, reproducibility and collaboration within data teams
Ability to understand business requirements and identify the best solution to achieve the expected outcome
Ability to handle an analytical project end-to-end, from business need understanding till results presentation
Ability to communicate both in Italian and English at all levels of the Organization (other European languages will be considered as a plus)
Experience in planning and coordination of project team activities maintaining challenging and collaborative environment
Ability to contribute to the management of a team-oriented environment
Experience in guiding or coaching junior team members within project delivery contexts
Willingness to continuously learn and research on new approach and technologies related to data management and analytics
Highly self-motivated, proactive
A collaborative mindset
Exceptional written and verbal communication skills


Personal Attributes


Highly self-motivated, proactive
A collaborative mindset
Exceptional written and verbal communication skills


You will have an advantage if, additionally, you have:


Previous Consulting and/or professional services experience
Proficiency in R and/or SQL
Experience with Hadoop, Apache Spark
Experience with NLP and text mining
Data Visualization skills on some of leading BI solutions (e.g. PowerBI, Tableau, Qlik)
Ability to bridge business needs and technical implementation in data and analytics projects
Experience in identifying new business opportunities
Experience in answering to RFIs or RFPs concerning analytics topics or software selection


We want to offer you a unique experience!


You will work in an organization where no two days are the same
You will have the opportunity to work on stand-alone change management projects, or as part of a multi-disciplined team delivering a large-scale technology or organization transformation program
You will work in an international organization that is large enough to offer a wide variety of challenging opportunities, but in a local community where everyone knows your name and are always willing to offer support
You will be supported in continuously growing your career and will have the opportunity to guide and mentor junior team members, contributing to both their technical development and broader professional growth
You will work with other like-minded and creative individuals to develop new ideas that have the potential to make a real difference to the businesses we work with
You will have the opportunity to support the development of new business and service offerings
You will have the opportunity to build strong relationships with BearingPoint top management and companies you will be working with


Are you interested in discovering more about our culture? Let's take a look at our Instagramprofile

About BearingPoint

BearingPoint is an independent management and technology consultancy with European roots and a global reach. We operate in four units: Consulting, Solutions, Business Services, and Ventures. Consulting covers the advisory business; Solutions provides the tools for successful digital transformation, advanced analytics and regulatory requirements; Business Services provides managed services beyond SaaS; Ventures drives the financing and development of start-ups.

Our clients include many of the world’s leading companies and organizations. We have a global consulting network with more than 10,000 people and support clients in over 75 countries, engaging with them to achieve measurable and sustainable success.

We are guided by our purpose – Together, we are more than business.

It revolves around three key areas of focus – More innovation, more for our planet and more for our people. Our people promises – Purpose in Practice, Deeper Connections, New Flexibility, Personal and Professional Growth, and Holistic Wellbeing and Rewards, brings together our values, aspirations, and responsibilities towards our people. It helps our people achieve and accomplish more than you can imagine possible.

We can’t do this alone. We can do this together. Join us!

Interested?

If this sounds like the ideal environment for you to work, innovate and achieve our shared purpose, join our high-performing team, apply now!

Equality & Inclusion

BearingPoint is an equal opportunities employer. We are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive workforce where each individual feels they belong. Fostering a work environment with a strong sense of community and where everyone can thrive is a core pillar of our business.

We are focused on attracting and retaining the best people with the right skills and the desire to deliver excellent results, regardless of background. In return, we will provide a working environment in which everyone feels valued and has the opportunity to fulfill their potential, where their talents are fully utilized, and company goals are met. We celebrate the strength that comes from our similarities and our differences through local initiatives which promote inclusion, outreach, and respect.

Title: Data Scientist Senior - GenAI Solutions
HTML:
The ideal candidate as Senior Data Scientist in NTT DATA will have a mix of skills including Generative AI hands-on capability (preferably on Azure/GCP and on-premise) engineering best practices, statistical expertise, Machine and Deep Learning skills and a strong business sense.

Your Contribution In This Role

  • Collaborate with data scientists, data engineers, ML Engineers, product managers, business analysts, and stakeholders from internal teams and external clients
  • Manage multiple projects simultaneously
  • Lead and coordinate the Data Scientists involved in the projects
  • Act as the main point of contact with client-side stakeholders
  • Ensure that project tasks are delivered on time and executed to a high standard


The ideal profile

  • Experience of at least 3-5 years as data scientist;
  • Strong Python (mandatory) and SQL coding;
  • Knowledge of Java/Scala or C++/R is a plus;
  • Tensorflow and Pytorch knowledge with a focus over Computer Vision solutions;
  • Knowledge of ML solutions architecture and Generative AI pipelines;
  • Cloud and hybrid ML implementations;
  • Incorporate new, cutting edge business intelligence, machine learning, and alternative data practices into wider organization to drive efficiencies and generate revenue;
  • Own the full stack execution of data science projects from data wrangling, model development, presentation, measurement to deployment;
  • Work with data engineers to produce fully productionized pipelines including data ingestion, cleaning, feature engineering and model training/prediction;
  • Conduct research and analysis into reinsurance and advisory products to augment industry-standard models and develop new market offerings;
  • Establish and maintain strong relationships with internal team members and external clients


Location: Milano, Bari, Bologna, Cosenza, Napoli, Roma, Salerno, Torino

Build your future with NTT DATA.

Join a global company, a leader in business and technology services, that listens to your voice and recognizes the value of your work. You will collaborate with clients, partners, and colleagues from all over the world to create innovative solutions capable of making a real impact on society.

Here, you will have the opportunity to develop new skills and expand your network.

We are present in Italy with over 6,000 employees across our offices in Milan, Rome, Turin, Genoa, Bologna, Treviso, Pisa, Padua, Naples, Cosenza, Bari, and Salerno.

Make this the place where you grow.

Join us!

Title: Freelance Data Scraping Engineer (Python)
Description:
Mindrift is looking for highly skilled Python Data Scraping Engineers to join the Tendem project and drive specialized data scraping workflows within our hybrid AI + human system.

In this role, as an AI Pilot - that's how we refer to this role at Mindrift - you'll collaborate with Tendem Agents that handle repetitive tasks, while you provide critical thinking, domain expertise, and quality control to deliver accurate and actionable results.

This part-time remote opportunity is ideal for technical professionals with hands-on experience in web scraping, data extraction and processing.

What We Do

The Mindrift platform connects specialists with AI projects from major tech innovators. Our mission is to unlock the potential of Generative AI by tapping into real-world expertise from across the globe.

About The Role

This is a freelance role for a Tendem project. As a Python Data Scraping Engineer, you'll handle data scraping tasks requiring technical precision for web extraction and processing, utilizing various tools such as our provided Apify and OpenRouter alongside your own resourceful approaches.

Key Responsibilities


Own end-to-end data extraction workflows across complex websites, ensuring complete coverage, accuracy, and reliable delivery of structured datasets.
Leverage internal tools (Apify, OpenRouter) alongside custom workflows to accelerate data collection, validation, and task execution while meeting defined requirements.
Ensure reliable extraction from dynamic and interactive web sources, adapting approaches as needed to handle JavaScript-rendered content and changing site behavior.
Enforce data quality standards through validation checks, cross-source consistency controls, adherence to formatting specifications, and systematic verification prior to delivery.
Scale scraping operations for large datasets using efficient batching or parallelization, monitor failures, and maintain stability against minor site structure changes


Compensation

On this project, contributors can earn up to $30 per hour equivalent, depending on their level and pace of contribution.

Compensation varies across projects depending on scope, complexity, and required expertise. Please note that other projects on the platform may offer different earning levels based on their requirements.

How To Get Started

Simply apply to this post, qualify, and get the chance to contribute to projects that match your technical skills, on your own schedule. From coding and automation to fine-tuning AI outputs, you'll play a key role in advancing AI capabilities and real-world applications.

Requirements


At least 3 year of relevant experience in data engineering, web scraping, automation, or software development (required).
Bachelor's or Master's Degree in Engineering, Applied Mathematics, Computer Science, or related technical fields is a plus
Strong experience in Python web scraping (BeautifulSoup, Selenium or similar), including dynamic content (JS, AJAX, infinite scroll) and APIs via proxies
Proven ability to extract data from complex structures (hierarchies, archived pages, inconsistent HTML)
Solid background in data cleaning, normalization, and validation, delivering structured datasets (CSV, JSON, Google Sheets)
Hands-on experience with LLMs and AI frameworks to enhance automation and problem-solving
Strong attention to detail and commitment to data accuracy
Self-directed work ethic with ability to troubleshoot independently
A link to GitHub is a plus
English proficiency: Upper-intermediate (B2) or above (required)


Benefits

Why this freelance opportunity might be a great fit for you?


Work fully remote on your own schedule with just a laptop and stable internet connection.
Gain hands-on experience in a unique hybrid environment where human expertise and AI agents collaborate seamlessly — a distinctive skill set in a rapidly growing field.
Participate in performance-based bonus programs that reward high-quality work and consistent delivery

Title: STEM Researcher - Fully Remote | Upto $75/hr
Description:
About The Job

Mercor connects elite creative and technical talent with leading AI research labs. Headquartered in San Francisco, our investors include Benchmark, General Catalyst, Peter Thiel, Adam D'Angelo, Larry Summers, and Jack Dorsey.

Position: STEM PhDs

Type: Contract

Compensation: $70–$75/hour

Location: Remote

Role Responsibilities


Develop challenging problems in your domain to enhance AI model training.
Evaluate and improve the quality of AI-generated data.
Collaborate with AI research teams to inform future innovations.
Work independently and asynchronously to meet project goals.
Ensure the accuracy and depth of AI model outputs.

Must-Have


STEM PhD from a US, UK, Canadian, or European university in Mathematics, Biology, Chemistry, Physics, Computer Science, Statistics, or Economics.
High attention to detail.
Exceptional written and verbal communication skills.

Interview Process


Complete a short interview taking 20–30 mins in total.

Upload resume

Submit form

For details about the interview process and platform information, please check: https://talent.docs.mercor.com/welcome
For any help or support, reach out to: support@mercor.com

Title: Neolaureati in Ingegneria e Materie STEM- Milano
HTML:
Guber Banca è una challenger bank italiana che coniuga innovazione, solidità e competenze specialistiche per offrire soluzioni evolute a supporto delle imprese.

Da oltre 30 anni operiamo trasformando esperienza e visione in valore, attraverso un modello operativo agile, digitale e orientato al lungo periodo. Mettiamo al centro le persone: promuoviamo un contesto di lavoro fondato su responsabilità, valorizzazione del merito e trasparenza, in cui ciascun professionista contribuisce allo sviluppo della banca e alla creazione di valore sostenibile.

“Digital, but human first” rappresenta il nostro modo di interpretare l’innovazione: evoluzione tecnologica e attenzione alla relazione umana.

Passione, innovazione, Flessibilità e Rispetto sono valori che rispecchiano il nostro modo di intendere il lavoro. Se ti piacciono le sfide, sei nel posto giusto!

Posizione

Hai appena conseguito (o stai per conseguire) una laurea in Ingegneria Gestionale, Informatica o discipline STEM?

Stiamo cercando persone da inserire nei nostri team a supporto:

  • dei processi del credito;
  • delle funzioni di direzione.

Se hai una laurea in Ingegneria Gestionale, Informatica o discipline STEM, potresti entrare nei nostri team e contribuire a:

  • progetti di Intelligenza Artificiale applicati al credito;
  • analisi dati e modelli a supporto delle decisioni;
  • ottimizzazione dei processi core bancari;

Su Cosa Lavorerai Concretamente

  • sviluppo e utilizzo di modelli AI e analitici per il credito
  • analisi di dataset per migliorare i processi decisionali
  • monitoraggio KPI e performance
  • collaborazione con team business e IT

Tech & strumenti (se hai già esperienza, è un plus)

  • Linguaggi: Python, SQL
  • Strumenti: Power BI, Tableau
  • Ambiti: credit risk, scoring, forecasting

Requisiti

Le persone che cerchiamo possiedono:

  • Laurea STEM;
  • Interesse per dati, AI e modelli decisionali;
  • Capacità analitiche e problem solving;
  • Proattività e attitudine al lavoro in team;

Perché questa opportunità è diversa? Perché unisce:

  • solidità del settore bancario
  • applicazioni concrete di AI e data analytics
  • impatto diretto su decisioni e processi core

Passione, innovazione, Flessibilità e Rispetto sono valori che rispecchiano il nostro modo di intendere il lavoro. Se ti piacciono le sfide, sei nel posto giusto!

Altre Informazioni

Per la posizione ricercata offriamo:

  • RAL a partire da € 26k;
  • CCNL applicato: Commercio - Terziario, Distribuzione e Servizi – 14 mensilità;
  • Tipologia contrattuale: Tempo determinato;
  • Welfare aziendale strutturato per sostenere il benessere delle persone;
  • Pacchetto assicurativo comprensivo di polizza sanitaria;
  • Ticket Restaurant;
  • Sede di lavoro: Milano
  • Percorso di crescita con esposizione a AI e progetti data-driven;
  • Formazione tecnica + affiancamento continuo;

Nota Trasparenza retributiva

La presente ricerca è aperta a tutte le persone, nel rispetto dei principi di pari opportunità e non discriminazione, previsti dalla normativa vigente.

Guber Banca promuove una cultura di equità e trasparenza. L’inquadramento e la proposta retributiva saranno definiti sulla base di criteri oggettivi, tra cui esperienza, competenze e responsabilità del ruolo, al fine di garantire coerenza e valorizzazione del merito, oltrechè neutrali sotto il profilo del genere (nel rispetto della normativa vigente).

Siamo convinti che la manifestazione dell’individualità e creatività sia un acceleratore dell’innovazione e, pertanto, un fattore decisivo per la crescita e la sostenibilità del Banca.

Title: Project Work in Clinical Data Science
Description:
Do you want a job with a purpose?
And do you want to make healthcare safer, better and more reliable?
Join our Team!

Unisciti a noi con un percorso di Project Work in Data Science in Dedalus, una delle aziende leader mondiali nello sviluppo di software sanitari. Avrai la possibilità di sviluppare la tua carriera e contribuire in maniera significativa a migliorare il processo di digital transformation in ambito sanitario.
 
Cosa troverai
Nella posizione di Data Science avrai la possibilità di entrare a far parte del team di Analytics e di sviluppare uno strumento basato su Intelligenza Artificiale in grado di mappare dati specifici degli ospedali, come reparti e unità di misura, verso vocabolari standardizzati, garantendo coerenza e interoperabilità dei dati.
 
Ti occuperai di:

Sviluppare e contribuire alla realizzazione di uno strumento basato su Intelligenza Artificiale per la mappatura di dati ospedalieri verso vocabolari standardizzati;
Analizzare dati provenienti da diverse strutture sanitarie e identificare modalità di normalizzazione e standardizzazione;
Progettare e implementare logiche di data mapping tra informazioni specifiche dei sistemi ospedalieri e standard condivisi.
Collaborare con team tecnici e stakeholder del settore healthcare per comprendere i requisiti e migliorare la qualità dei dati

 
Fai un passo aggiuntivo nella tua carriera, avrà un impatto significativo
In Dedalus il nostro motto è la vita scorre nei nostri software e ogni giorno facciamo qualcosa di speciale aiutando gli assistenti e gli operatori sanitari a fornire cure migliori alle loro comunità. Ecco cosa ricerchiamo:
 
Requisiti essenziali

Laurea in Informatica, Ingegneria Informatica, Data Science, Intelligenza Artificiale o discipline affini;
Conoscenza dei principali linguaggi di programmazione, preferibilmente Python;
Esperienza nello sviluppo di soluzioni di Intelligenza Artificiale e Machine Learning, con particolare interesse per i modelli NLP/LLM;
Familiarità con tecniche di mapping, data trasformation e data integration;
Conoscenza di database relazionali e NoSQL.
Ottima conoscenza della lingua inglese

 
Siamo Dedalus, unisciti a noi
Dedalus si impegna a fornire un'esperienza lavorativa coinvolgente e gratificante che rifletta la passione che mettiamo nella missione di aiutare i medici e gli infermieri a fornire cure migliori nelle comunità in cui operano.
La nostra azienda promuove una cultura in cui i dipendenti sono incoraggiati a imparare, innovare e a promuovere e migliorare la cooperazione e i processi clinici, facendo al contempo una differenza significativa per milioni di persone in tutto il mondo. Ogni persona è il punto di arrivo e di partenza delle attività del Gruppo e il beneficiario finale. Per questo motivo, siamo orgogliosi di svolgere ogni giorno un lavoro molto speciale.
La nostra azienda è eterogenea e composta da 7.600 persone distribuite in più di 40 Paesi, lavoriamo insieme per innovare e migliorare le opportunità sanitarie di milioni di pazienti in tutto il mondo. Noi siamo Dedalus.
 
Puoi presentare la tua candidatura fino al: 27 luglio 2026
 
Il nostro Diversity & Inclusion Commitment definisce l'approccio di Dedalus per garantire il rispetto, l'inclusione e il successo di tutte le nostre persone e delle comunità in cui operiamo. È indispensabile per noi condividere l’impegno e la dedizione per poter garantire un ambiente di lavoro inclusivo e diversificato. Riconosciamo che possiamo migliorare e, in questo percorso, miriamo ad essere autentici, realistici, ma anche molto ambiziosi.
Our diversity & inclusion commitment – Dedalus Global
 
La vita scorre nei nostri software

Title: Experienced – Data Scientist GenAI
Description:
Stiamo cercando una figura Senior Consultant da inserire nel team Digital, AI Controls & Algorithms per le sedi di Roma e Milano che lavorerà in modalità Hybrid.

L’area Digital, AI Controls & Algorithms è un’area di frontiera nell’utilizzo di tecnologie avanzate e si occupa di fornire servizi di Digital Transformation con l’obiettivo di supportare la digitalizzazione dei processi di business delle principali multinazionali clienti. Le attività prevedono l’utilizzo di strumenti di Generative AI, AI e Data Analytics, integrati all’interno di un ecosistema applicativo e infrastrutturale all’avanguardia (SOTA). Per questo, sfruttiamo i principali servizi offerti dai maggiori player del settore Cloud, oltre a soluzioni di deployment locali on-premise.

Your Role

La risorsa Experienced verrà inserita in un team di lavoro e si occuperà di:


Leadership Tecnologica: Assumere il ruolo di Team Leader, supervisionando e coordinando un team tecnico di sviluppo o consulenti junior con diverse expertise
Progettazione e Analisi Soluzioni AI & GenAI: Analizzare e progettare soluzioni GenAI, AI complesse, sia applicative che di integrazione con diversi sistemi
Gestione del Problem Solving: Affrontare e risolvere autonomamente problematiche tecniche articolate, mantenendo efficienza e precisione anche sotto pressione;
Collaborazione Internazionale: Operare all'interno di team numerosi e diversificati, con la possibilità di interagire su scala internazionale.


What We Offer

La retribuzione prevista per questa posizione è compresa tra EUR 33.000 e EUR 37.500 lordi annui per il grade Consultant, e tra EUR 40.000 e EUR 49.000 lordi annui per il grade Senior Consultant.

L'inquadramento verrà definito in fase di selezione sulla base del profilo e in applicazione del CCNL Terziario Distribuzione e Servizi.

La definizione del compenso specifico, inclusi eventuali elementi variabili (come MBO) o benefit accessori, dipenderà dalla valutazione del profilo rispetto ai requisiti della posizione.

Winning Requirements


Laurea in materie STEM;
Esperienza nella gestione end-to-end di progetti di Data Science: raccolta requisiti, progettazione, sviluppo e test di soluzioni AI e GenAI. In particolare è richiesta esperienza di almeno 5 anni nell’ambito dei progetti di AI/ML e 2 anni nell’ambito dei progetti di GenAI
Conoscenza dei principali foundation model (llama, gpt, sonnet etc.) e loro applicazione a seconda della specificità del progetto.
Esperienza pregressa nello sviluppo di applicazioni di Generative AI (langchain, llamaindex, ecc.) con sviluppo e rilascio in produzione di soluzioni RAG sia in modalità chatbot che non
Ottima conoscenza di Python e delle librerie per manipolazione dati e sviluppo modelli;
Esperienza con strumenti di containerizzazione (e.g. docker) e strumenti di versioning del codice (e.g. GIT)
Conoscenza di strumenti e linguaggi per la manipolazione dei dati: SQL, MongoDB, Neo4j, Spark, ecc.
Ottima conoscenza della lingua inglese;
Flessibilità, disponibilità a viaggiare.


To Make An Impact That Matters

Il network Deloitte, leader nei servizi professionali alle imprese, opera a livello globale in più di 150 Paesi con oltre 460 mila persone.

In Italia, Deloitte è presente in 24 città con circa 13.400 persone che assistono i clienti offrendo servizi di Audit & Assurance, Technology & Transformantion, Strategy, Risk & Transactions Advisory e Tax & Legal.

In qualità di network globale ci impegniamo per affrontare le principali sfide sociali, economiche e ambientali della società di oggi. WorldImpact è il nostro programma globale che riunisce tutte le iniziative attraverso cui vogliamo avere un impatto positivo sulle persone, i clienti, l’ambiente e le comunità in cui operiamo.

Con Impact for Italy, la declinazione italiana di WorldImpact, Deloitte ha realizzato progetti che - in collaborazione con istituzioni, realtà del terzo settore, università e altri soggetti - hanno lasciato un impatto concreto e una legacy per il futuro su tutto il territorio nazionale.

La ricerca rispetta il d.lgs. 198/2006, il D.lgs. 215/03 e il D.lgs. 216/03 ed è aperta a candidat* di qualsiasi orientamento o espressione di genere, orientamento sessuale, età, etnia e credo religioso. Il presente annuncio è stato ideato nel rispetto della diversity e dell’inclusività.
